name: Kuba- Sherry B
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onions in butter until translucent.
2. Wash mushrooms until free from grit.
3. Add barley (or barley grits), mushrooms, salt, and water to the onions and cook uncovered until the water has evaporated, stirring frequently. The mixture will be very thick.
4. Add remaining ingredients.
5. Place in a greased casserole or baking dish and bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes. Cut this recipe in half unless serving a large crowd. It also freezes well.
